stories.title: Follow live: Spurs, Thunder battle in double OT fo...
Canadiens outlast Sabres in overtime in Game 7
stories.summary: Alex Newhook scored his second Game 7-winning goal of the postseason, this time in overtime in the Canadiens' win over the Sabres on Monday night.

stories.title: 'Little shocked': Steelers react to Rodgers' retur...
stories.summary: Quarterback Aaron Rodgers took the practice field with his Steelers teammates at OTAs on Monday after signing his one-year contract.

stories.title: Sources: City expect Guardiola exit after season
stories.summary: Manchester City are resigned to losing Pep Guardiola as their manager at the end of the season, sources have told ESPN.

stories.title: Nats ban spectator over white nationalist banner
stories.summary: The Nationals identified at least one person who will be banned from the ballpark after a banner promoting a white nationalist website was unfurled in the crowd during Sunday's game.
